description: Triggers for organizing capability blocks, writing bets, and creating product roadmaps

queries.query: Organize my product into capability blocks for better roadmap communication
Convert this discovery opportunity into a structured bet with hypothesis and metrics
Build a Now/Next/Later roadmap from our prioritized bets
Write a solution brief for the onboarding bet we've committed to
Prioritize our bet backlog using ICE scoring for Q2 planning
Review this roadmap for date-commitment and feature-factory anti-patterns
Design quarterly themes for our product organization
Create a bet backlog from our discovery opportunities with kill criteria
Help me organize features into customer-value-oriented blocks (not technical ones)
Build an outcome-based roadmap for our product for the next 4 quarters
Run customer interviews to validate this product opportunity
Set up a weekly discovery rhythm for our product team
Design a staged rollout plan for our new feature
Run a bet retrospective and decide scale/iterate/kill
Help me coach a PM who is struggling with stakeholder management
Build an agency-control tradeoff for our AI feature
Write a 1-page strategy canvas for our product
Design our team operating rhythm and meeting cadences
Set up metrics hierarchy with leading and lagging indicators
Create GTM plan for our product launch
